content:
「你知道吗？毫无预兆的风暴🌀面前，鱼也会溺死。
海上航行的大冒险⛵，在记忆里搁浅，戛然而止。」
以上，是翻译过来的伦蒂尼恩通用语，基于莫丝手脚并用的比划。
至于翻译的准确度，一切解释权💭或许归守密人所有。

鱼🐟的眼泪，只有黑漆漆的海水知道。
莫丝拥抱的温度，弥萨格的朋友们@everyone都知道！
「啊呜！烤鱼，好吃！」

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

"You know? When a storm🌀 hits without warning, even fish can drown.That great sea voyage⛵, once so full of promise, ended too soon. Now it just sits, quiet, in my memory."
That’s probably what Vortice meant, pieced together from her broken Leonian, wild gestures, and expressive hands. As for how accurate it really is—well, perhaps only the Keeper can say💭.

The tears of drowned fish🐟 are known only to the dark, endless sea.But the warmth of Vortice's embrace? Every friend@everyone of hers in Mythag knows by heart!
"Yum yum! Roast fish! Tasty!"
